Safety BoundariesDisabled runtime by design
HomeSystem StoryValidator MapTechnical AppendixLive Dashboard

Safety wall

The current build is deliberately non-executing.

The safety posture is explicit. These capabilities are not active, and the demo does not hide that fact.

Non-negotiables

Runtime activation requires separate approval and a separate phase.

No runtime activation

The demo is read-only and does not start live execution.

No command execution

There are no command execution paths in the browser demo.

No action execution

Actions are described, not run.

No backend execution

No backend execution is enabled.

No deploy controls

No deploy controls are available in the app.

No merge controls

No merge controls are available in the app.

No push controls

No push controls are available in the app.

No public writes

The site does not expose write paths for public data.

No database or Supabase writes

Data mutation remains disabled.

No alert sending

Alerting is not active in this phase.

No rollback execution

Rollback remains a future runtime responsibility.

No incident mutation

Incidents are reviewed, not modified by runtime logic.

No deploy / merge / push controls in app

The app cannot publish or mutate the repo.

No automation

No automation is enabled.

No endpoints

The browser demo is pure static HTML/CSS/JS.

No Netlify functions

There are no serverless functions in the demo hub.

The same safety posture is reiterated in the source package and validators.
